DESCRIPTION: RUN_ID is assigned in createRunContext and stored in run_manifest.json but the scan and operators also treat the folder basename as authoritative without mandatory JSON equality check; desync or legacy folders could disagree.
No parent field in standard run_manifest.json; L2 and L3 bundle CSVs use different keys and live outside the unified manifest schema; two parallel parent concepts.
Same phrase maps to pipeline variables in run_switching_canonical.m scan policy column INPUT_SOURCE trusted id and doc trust list; meanings overlap only informally.

Execution fingerprint fields exist only in run_manifest.json; control scan output run_fingerprint.csv omits hash fields and reuses the word fingerprint for a different row shape; risk of operators conflating outputs.

Semantic status rows are written only by the canonical runner; validator infers compliance from source text; scan only checks file existence so PARTIAL vs SUCCESS vs missing content can diverge in interpretation.
